title: Chamaesyce makinoi
taxonomy: Chamaesyce makinoi is classified within the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is a species within the genus Chamaesyce. It is native to Japan and is also known as Makino's spurge. Chamaesyce makinoi is a herbaceous plant that grows in woodland areas and along streams. It is a member of the Spurge family and is closely related to other plants in the same genus.
